metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1775
metadata.comment:
Rationale: NCAT2 (Hirano et al., 1992), a rat mAb against alphaN-catenin, was used for
production of other mAbs to this protein. alphaN-catenin selective monoclonal antibody is used in immunoperoxidase and immunogold labelling of cerebellum and cortex. The authors highlighted recruitment to symmetrical pre- and post synaptic adherence appositions that tend to border release site. They also show early developmental recruitment of this symmetrical adhesive structures prior to synaptic vesicle clustering.

2/11/2017 Pim
- Based on the interaction with N-cadherin shown in Fig.8 the 'extrinsic component...' variant of membrane association was used.. Experimental description: Materials and methods. "For adult mice those older than 1 mo were used.........The days when the animals were born was regarded as postnatal day 0. The study also used chicken tissue but figures for the annotation involved mouse tissue.
